nasb.text: “If you lend money to My people, to the poor among you, you are not to act as a creditor to him; you shall not charge him interest.

esv.text: “If you lend money to any of my people with you who is poor, you shall not be like a moneylender to him, and you shall not exact interest from him.

cnv.text: “如果你借錢給我的人民，就是與你們在一起的窮人，你對待他們不可像放債的人一樣，不可在他們身上取利。

ccb.text: “倘若有贫苦的同胞向你借钱，你不可像放债的一样从中取利。
